label: 322_small businesses_sblf_small business_business lending
description: Documents discuss the Small Business Jobs Act of 2010 and efforts by Congress and the Federal Reserve to bolster small business lending. The focus is on providing financial assistance to help create jobs and support entrepreneurship in the wake of the financial crisis.

earliest_articles.title: Statement of Treasury Secretary Geithner On Senate Passage of Jobs Bill
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-562 WASHINGTON – The U.S. Department of the Treasury today released the following statement from Secretary Tim Geithner on the passage of HR 2847 in the United States Senate: Today, the need to get Americans back to work prevailed.
